headline: Jack Henry Releases Annual Sustainability Report
summary: Jack Henry® (Nasdaq: JKHY) today announced the publication of its 2026 Sustainability Report, highlighting the company's progress in advancing responsible business practices and preserving long-term value for associates, clients, communities, stockholders, and the environment.

headline: Jack Henry & Associates Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) Emerges as a Top Dividend Stock for Sustainable Income
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) offers a reliable, growing dividend supported by strong profitability and a debt-free balance sheet for sustainable income.
